en: of Colonel. You snotty little bastard. Your Honor, I'd like to ask for a recess. I'd like an answer
to the question, Judge. The court will wait for an answer. If Lieutenant Kendrick gave an order
that Santiago wasn't to be touched, then why did he have to be transferred? Colonel,
Lieutenant Kendrick ordered the code read, didn't he? Because that's what you told Lieutenant
ko: 그건 당신이 켄드릭 중위에게 시킨 일이잖아요. 반대합니다!

en: Kendrick to do. Object! And when it went bad, you cut these guys loose! Your Honor! You had
ko: 일이 잘못되자, 당신은 이 사람들을 내버려 두었군요! 재판장님!

en: Colonel Jessup, did you order the code read? You don't have to answer that question.
I'll answer the question. You want answers? I think I'm entitled. You want answers! I want
ko: 제가 질문에 답하겠습니다. 답변이 필요하신가요? 저는 그럴 자격이 있다고 생각합니다. 답변이 필요하신가요! 저는 진실이 필요합니다!

en: the truth! You can't handle the truth! Son, we live in a world that has walls, and those walls
have to be guarded by men with guns. Who's gonna do it? You? You, Lieutenant Weinberg?
ko: 누가 그 일을 할 건가? 너?

en: I have a greater responsibility than you can possibly fathom. You weep for Santiago,
ko: 나는 네가 상상할 수 있는 것보다 더 큰 책임이 있어.
